tide-pool.prompt: A cinematic 16:9 desktop wallpaper looking straight down into a sunlit macro tide pool at midday. Clear turquoise water over pale sand, smooth wet pebbles in coral, ochre, lavender, and slate. A few painted anemones open in jelly-pink and seafoam; a scatter of tiny hermit shells sits along the upper-right rocks. Soft refractive caustics net across the sand in pale gold. Ultra-crisp macro photography meets painterly illustration, 8k detail, shallow focus on the central rim.
